items.title: We Interviewed "Giannis" Recruiting LeBron to Miami 😂

items.body_excerpt: What happens when "LeBron James" interviews "Giannis Antetokounmpo" about free agency? 😂 Comedian Jared Harvin joined Danny Green and Harrison Sanford and completely committed to the bit. 🎙️ Full episode drops Thursday morning, including our reaction to the blockbuster Jaylen…

items.title: RJ Says He KNOWS LeBron's Real Plan... And He's Not Telling
items.body_excerpt: LeBron tells the Lakers he's playing elsewhere and the crew can't agree on where he lands. RJ swears he knows the real plan, while Perk says LeBron taking the vet minimum means every contender should shoot their shot. 🏀 Download the Fanatics Sportsbook app!…
